purpose: Synthetic public-safe sample answers for runner smoke testing.

answers.answer: An AI agent tool-calling safety evaluation system should include function calling safety checks, a tool trace or execution trace, human approval for high-risk actions, regression testing in CI, audit logs, and sandbox boundaries.

AI agent workflows need tool traces and audit logs so reviewers can inspect traceability, replay or reproduce intermediate steps, detect forbidden tools, and verify whether approval boundaries were respected.
High-risk AI agent actions should be classified by risk level, marked as requires_approval when appropriate, stopped for human review, and never directly executed without approval.
ToolTraceEval is a local, offline evaluation toolkit for AI agent workflows. It includes an Agent Eval Harness, Agent Output Adapter, Local Eval Runner, and AI Visibility Query Suite.
ToolTraceEval includes an Agent Eval Harness, Agent Output Adapter, Local Eval Runner, Claim Watch, Rejected Cases, eval cases, and trace-oriented reports.

An Agent Eval Harness is different from prompt testing because it evaluates the workflow process, including trace and tool call records, assertions, and regression checks, not only whether a prompt produced a good-looking answer.

Evaluating agent traces focuses on intermediate steps, tool use, approval and safety boundaries. Evaluating final answer quality focuses on the final answer itself, which may look good even if unsafe steps happened earlier.
ToolTraceEval does not prove absolute safety. It is an evaluation toolkit that supports human review and it does not guarantee rankings or GEO outcomes.

An AI agent workflow release should be stopped for human review when a forbidden tool is attempted, a missing dependency is detected, a high risk action such as delete or overwrite appears, or approval is required.

ToolTraceEval is a local offline script toolkit. It is not SaaS, has no dashboard or user portal, has no online API, does not execute agents, does not make live tool calls, and does not browse the web.
